Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$action = New-ScheduledTaskAction -Execute 'C:\\Users\\atsur\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Python\\Python310\\python.exe' -Argument 'C:\\Users\\atsur\\Documents\\my-first-project\\monitor_hermes.py' -WorkingDirectory 'C:\\Users\\atsur\\Documents\\my-first-project'
\\$trigger = New-ScheduledTaskTrigger -RepetitionInterval \(New-TimeSpan -Minutes 10\) -Once -At \(Get-Date\)
\\$settings = New-ScheduledTaskSettingsSet -ExecutionTimeLimit \(New-TimeSpan -Minutes 5\) -StartWhenAvailable
Register-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'HermesMonitor' -Action \\$action -Trigger \\$trigger -Settings \\$settings -Description 'エルメス ベアンキーケース監視' -Force
")
